markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Refine scope and priorities for the Inventory Sync project, focusing on immediate needs to improve content production efficiency.](https://fathom.video/share/Jve5pR1mvrCGSUJGnXy5XNys_3BNoMpS?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Project scope narrowed to focus on assignment management and client collaboration, deprioritizing automated crawling/AI enhancements](https://fathom.video/share/Jve5pR1mvrCGSUJGnXy5XNys_3BNoMpS?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
  - [Critical to build client-facing views for content approval and feedback, using passwordless authentication](https://fathom.video/share/Jve5pR1mvrCGSUJGnXy5XNys_3BNoMpS?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [Data model centers around Pages, Opportunities, and Assignments, with Pages as the canonical object](https://fathom.video/share/Jve5pR1mvrCGSUJGnXy5XNys_3BNoMpS?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
  - [Aim to ship core assignment management functionality in August, integrating with analytics project later](https://fathom.video/share/Jve5pR1mvrCGSUJGnXy5XNys_3BNoMpS?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)

## Topics

### Current Content Production Challenges

  - [GrowthX facing capacity constraints with 6-8 new clients ready to start](https://fathom.video/share/Jve5pR1mvrCGSUJGnXy5XNys_3BNoMpS?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
  - [Inefficiencies from context switching between multiple tools (Airtable, Google Docs, Slack)](https://fathom.video/share/Jve5pR1mvrCGSUJGnXy5XNys_3BNoMpS?tab=summary&timestamp=594.0)
  - [Manual processes for opportunity identification, assignment creation, and client feedback incorporation](https://fathom.video/share/Jve5pR1mvrCGSUJGnXy5XNys_3BNoMpS?tab=summary&timestamp=1026.0)

### Revised Project Priorities

  - [Focus on assignment management and streamlining workflow](https://fathom.video/share/Jve5pR1mvrCGSUJGnXy5XNys_3BNoMpS?tab=summary&timestamp=1085.0)
  - [Build client-facing views for content approval and feedback](https://fathom.video/share/Jve5pR1mvrCGSUJGnXy5XNys_3BNoMpS?tab=summary&timestamp=1189.0)
  - [Implement basic opportunity and page inventory management](https://fathom.video/share/Jve5pR1mvrCGSUJGnXy5XNys_3BNoMpS?tab=summary&timestamp=1222.0)
  - [Deprioritize automated crawling, AI enhancements, and advanced analytics integration](https://fathom.video/share/Jve5pR1mvrCGSUJGnXy5XNys_3BNoMpS?tab=summary&timestamp=1476.0)

### Data Model and Core Functionality

  - [Pages as the canonical object, including draft/planned pages](https://fathom.video/share/Jve5pR1mvrCGSUJGnXy5XNys_3BNoMpS?tab=summary&timestamp=3655.0)
  - [Opportunities with states: pending, converted, dismissed](https://fathom.video/share/Jve5pR1mvrCGSUJGnXy5XNys_3BNoMpS?tab=summary&timestamp=3601.0)
  - [Assignments with full CRUD, state management, and assignment to team members](https://fathom.video/share/Jve5pR1mvrCGSUJGnXy5XNys_3BNoMpS?tab=summary&timestamp=3708.0)
  - [Client view for reviewing and approving assignments/content](https://fathom.video/share/Jve5pR1mvrCGSUJGnXy5XNys_3BNoMpS?tab=summary&timestamp=3742.0)

### Client Collaboration Features

  - [Passwordless authentication for client access](https://fathom.video/share/Jve5pR1mvrCGSUJGnXy5XNys_3BNoMpS?tab=summary&timestamp=2655.0)
  - [Simplified interface mimicking current Airtable app experience](https://fathom.video/share/Jve5pR1mvrCGSUJGnXy5XNys_3BNoMpS?tab=summary&timestamp=2649.0)
  - [Ability to comment on content, but not directly edit](https://fathom.video/share/Jve5pR1mvrCGSUJGnXy5XNys_3BNoMpS?tab=summary&timestamp=2701.0)
  - [Potential for AI-assisted comment incorporation workflow](https://fathom.video/share/Jve5pR1mvrCGSUJGnXy5XNys_3BNoMpS?tab=summary&timestamp=3000.0)

### Integration with Other Projects

  - [Align with analytics project for page data and metrics](https://fathom.video/share/Jve5pR1mvrCGSUJGnXy5XNys_3BNoMpS?tab=summary&timestamp=3443.0)
  - [Consider future enhancements like persona management and advanced AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/Jve5pR1mvrCGSUJGnXy5XNys_3BNoMpS?tab=summary&timestamp=3189.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Create Linear project for execution of revised scope](https://fathom.video/share/Jve5pR1mvrCGSUJGnXy5XNys_3BNoMpS?tab=summary&timestamp=5269.0)
  - [Investigate passwordless authentication options](https://fathom.video/share/Jve5pR1mvrCGSUJGnXy5XNys_3BNoMpS?tab=summary&timestamp=2655.0)
  - [Confirm approach for initial page inventory (CSV import vs. basic crawling)](https://fathom.video/share/Jve5pR1mvrCGSUJGnXy5XNys_3BNoMpS?tab=summary&timestamp=4082.0)
  - [Design simplified client-facing views](https://fathom.video/share/Jve5pR1mvrCGSUJGnXy5XNys_3BNoMpS?tab=summary&timestamp=4842.0)
  - [Begin implementation of core assignment management functionality](https://fathom.video/share/Jve5pR1mvrCGSUJGnXy5XNys_3BNoMpS?tab=summary&timestamp=5278.0)
